commented_code:
# NOTE: All other configuration has been moved to database management!
 # Run the credentials_setup.sql file in your Supabase SQL editor to set up the credentials table.
 # Then use the Settings page in the web UI to manage:
-# - OPENAI_API_KEY (encrypted)
-# - MODEL_CHOICE 
+# - AI Provider Keys (encrypted):
+#   * OPENAI_API_KEY - For OpenAI models
+#   * AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY - For Azure OpenAI models
+#   * GOOGLE_API_KEY - For Google Gemini models
+# - LLM Provider Selection (openai, azure, google, ollama)
+# - Azure OpenAI specific settings:
+#   * AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT - Your Azure resource endpoint

discussion_comments.commented_code:
@@ -30,8 +30,15 @@ EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS=1536
 # NOTE: All other configuration has been moved to database management!
 # Run the credentials_setup.sql file in your Supabase SQL editor to set up the credentials table.
 # Then use the Settings page in the web UI to manage:
-# - OPENAI_API_KEY (encrypted)
-# - MODEL_CHOICE 
+# - AI Provider Keys (encrypted):
+#   * OPENAI_API_KEY - For OpenAI models
+#   * AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY - For Azure OpenAI models
+#   * GOOGLE_API_KEY - For Google Gemini models
+# - LLM Provider Selection (openai, azure, google, ollama)
+# - Azure OpenAI specific settings:
+#   * AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT - Your Azure resource endpoint
discussion_comments.comment_body: This can simply be `OPENAI_ENDPOINT` and the endpoint should also include the endpoint version in the URL. When no specified, it will be set to the default OpenAI endpoint of `https://api.openai.com/v1`.
